holdings.infoBox: ARWG is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are RXO, Inc. stock at 3.34%, Sandisk at 3.13%, Lam Research at 3.11%, Western Digital at 2.98%, and MKS Inc. at 2.90%.

overview.description: The Archer Growth ETF (ARWG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term total returns while minimizing capital loss through investments in US growth companies. Security selection focuses on upward earnings revisions and projected earnings growth rates. ARWG was launched on Dec 29, 2025 and is issued by Archer Funds.
